info.name: E2E Template Backend Ravelware - Full Automation
info.description: Full E2E automation for Register, Login, Items (CRUD), Location (CRUD), Inbound, Outbound, Role, Profile. Everything executed chronologically. Do NOT shuffle.

exec: if(pm.response.code === 200) { const res = pm.response.json(); pm.collectionVariables.set('jwt_token', res.data.accessToken); pm.collectionVariables.set('refresh_token', res.data.refreshToken); pm.collectionVariables.set('user_id', res.data.user.id); }
if(pm.response.code === 200) { const res = pm.response.json(); pm.test('Schema check: No password returned', function() { pm.expect(res.data).not.to.have.property('password'); }); }

if(pm.response.code === 201) { const res = pm.response.json(); pm.collectionVariables.set('item_id', res.data.id); pm.collectionVariables.set('sku_code', res.data.sku_code); pm.collectionVariables.set('rfid_tag', res.data.rfid_tag); }
if(pm.response.code === 201) { const res = pm.response.json(); pm.collectionVariables.set('location_id', res.data.id); pm.collectionVariables.set('qr_string', res.data.qr_string); }
if(pm.response.code === 200) { const res = pm.response.json(); pm.test('Name updated properly', function() { pm.expect(res.data.item_name).to.eql('Postman Item Updated'); }); }
if(pm.response.code === 201) { const res = pm.response.json(); pm.collectionVariables.set('inbound_id', res.data.id); pm.collectionVariables.set('inbound_po_number', res.data.po_number); }
if(pm.response.code === 201) { const res = pm.response.json(); pm.collectionVariables.set('outbound_id', res.data.id); }
if(pm.response.code === 200) { const res = pm.response.json(); pm.test('Item picked & Auto-staged', function() { pm.expect(res.data.message).to.contain('picked'); }); }

if(pm.response.code === 200) { const res = pm.response.json(); pm.test('Check new aggregate fields', function() { pm.expect(res.data).to.have.property('total_qty_target'); pm.expect(res.data).to.have.property('progress_percentage'); }); }
if(pm.response.code === 200) { const res = pm.response.json(); pm.test('Order is finalized in sync', function() { pm.expect(res.data.message).to.contain('synchronized'); }); }
if(pm.response.code === 200) { const res = pm.response.json(); pm.test('Should have history logs', function() { pm.expect(res.data.length).to.be.greaterThan(0); }); }
if(pm.response.code === 200) { const res = pm.response.json(); pm.test('Should return an array', function() { pm.expect(Array.isArray(res.data)).to.be.true; }); }
if(pm.response.code === 201) { const res = pm.response.json(); pm.collectionVariables.set('staging_id', res.data.id); }
if(pm.response.code === 201) { const res = pm.response.json(); pm.collectionVariables.set('sku_a', res.data.sku_code); }
if(pm.response.code === 201) { const res = pm.response.json(); pm.collectionVariables.set('sku_b', res.data.sku_code); }
if(pm.response.code === 201) { const res = pm.response.json(); pm.collectionVariables.set('loc_1_qr', res.data.qr_string); }
if(pm.response.code === 201) { const res = pm.response.json(); pm.collectionVariables.set('loc_2_qr', res.data.qr_string); }

Scenario 4: Two Orders mixed SKUs same rack
